project: SISO - Fluxo de Separacao e Embalagem
description: Fluxo pos-aprovacao: separacao fisica no galpao (wave picking) e embalagem com conferencia na bancada. Nova pagina /separacao com 5 abas de status, checklist de separacao em onda, embalagem por produto com bipagem, e impressao automatica de etiqueta.

userStories.title: Types — StatusSeparacao and related types
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all new types defined in types/index.ts so that subsequent stories have full type safety.
acceptanceCriteria: Add StatusSeparacao type: 'aguardando_nf' | 'aguardando_separacao' | 'em_separacao' | 'separado' | 'embalado' | 'cancelado'
Add ProdutoConsolidado type with fields: produto_id (string), descricao (string), sku (string), gtin (string | null), quantidade_total (number), unidade (string), localizacao (string | null)
Add BipEmbalagemResult type with fields: pedido_id (string), produto_id (string), quantidade_bipada (number), bipado_completo (boolean), pedido_completo (boolean)

Add SeparacaoFilter type with fields: status_separacao (StatusSeparacao, optional), empresa_origem_id (string, optional), sort ('data_pedido' | 'localizacao' | 'sku', optional), busca (string, optional)
Add SeparacaoCounts type with fields: aguardando_nf (number), aguardando_separacao (number), em_separacao (number), separado (number), embalado (number)
Update PedidoItem type adding: separacao_marcado (boolean), separacao_marcado_em (string | null)

Update Pedido type adding: separacao_operador_id (string | null), separacao_iniciada_em (string | null), separacao_concluida_em (string | null), embalagem_concluida_em (string | null), etiqueta_url (string | null), agrupamento_expedicao_id (string | null)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Schema — Migration for new separation statuses and columns
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the database schema updated with new separation statuses and tracking columns so that the entire flow can be persisted.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration file supabase/migrations/20260311_separacao_status_columns.sql
ALTER siso_pedidos: drop old CHECK constraint on status_separacao, add new CHECK with values: aguardando_nf, aguardando_separacao, em_separacao, separado, embalado, cancelado
UPDATE existing rows: SET status_separacao = 'aguardando_separacao' WHERE status_separacao = 'pendente'

ADD columns to siso_pedidos: separacao_operador_id (uuid REFERENCES siso_usuarios(id) NULL), separacao_iniciada_em (timestamptz NULL), separacao_concluida_em (timestamptz NULL), embalagem_concluida_em (timestamptz NULL), etiqueta_url (text NULL), agrupamento_expedicao_id (text NULL)
ADD columns to siso_pedido_itens: separacao_marcado (boolean DEFAULT false), separacao_marcado_em (timestamptz NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_siso_pedidos_status_empresa ON siso_pedidos(status_separacao, empresa_origem_id)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: PL/pgSQL — Consolidate products for wave picking
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a database function that consolidates products across multiple orders into a single wave-picking list grouped by produto_id with summed quantities.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration file supabase/migrations/20260311_fn_consolidar_produtos_separacao.sql
CREATE FUNCTION siso_consolidar_produtos_separacao(p_pedido_ids uuid[], p_order_by text DEFAULT 'localizacao')
Function queries siso_pedido_itens for the given pedido_ids, groups by produto_id
Returns TABLE(produto_id text, descricao text, sku text, gtin text, quantidade_total numeric, unidade text, localizacao text)
Gets localizacao from siso_pedido_item_estoques joining on pedido_id + produto_id for the origin empresa
Supports p_order_by values: 'localizacao' (default), 'sku', 'descricao'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: pedido_id is text (not uuid) in DB — function uses text[] param. No unidade column exists; defaults to 'UN'.

userStories.title: PL/pgSQL — Process barcode scan during packing
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a database function that processes a barcode scan during packing, finds the oldest order with that item pending, and updates quantities atomically.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration file supabase/migrations/20260311_fn_processar_bip_embalagem.sql
CREATE FUNCTION siso_processar_bip_embalagem(p_sku text, p_galpao_id uuid, p_quantidade int DEFAULT 1)
Finds the oldest separado-status pedido (ORDER BY data_pedido ASC) in the given galpao with the scanned SKU where bipado_completo = false
Uses SELECT ... FOR UPDATE on the matching siso_pedido_itens row to prevent race conditions
Increments quantidade_bipada by p_quantidade on the matched row
Sets bipado_completo = true when quantidade_bipada >= quantidade
Checks if ALL items of that pedido have bipado_completo = true; if so, updates status_separacao to 'embalado' and sets embalagem_concluida_em = now()
Returns TABLE(pedido_id uuid, produto_id text, quantidade_bipada numeric, bipado_completo boolean, pedido_completo boolean)
RETURNS NULL if no matching item found
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: pedido_id is text (not uuid) in DB — function returns text. Filters galpao via empresa_origem_id → siso_empresas.galpao_id join (more robust than separacao_galpao_id).

userStories.title: API — GET /api/separacao list orders by status
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to fetch orders filtered by separation status with search and sorting so that each tab shows the right data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/separacao/route.ts with GET handler (do NOT conflict with existing files — check first)
Accepts query params: status_separacao, empresa_origem_id, sort (data_pedido|localizacao|sku), busca (search string)
Queries siso_pedidos with filters, joins siso_empresas via empresa_origem_id for empresa name
Returns JSON: { counts: SeparacaoCounts, pedidos: array }
Counts query: SELECT status_separacao, count(*) FROM siso_pedidos GROUP BY status_separacao
Each pedido in array includes: id, numero_nf, numero_ec, numero_pedido, cliente, uf, cidade, forma_envio, data_pedido, empresa_origem_nome, status_separacao, marcadores
Role-based filtering: read cargo from X-User-Cargo header or session; operador_cwb sees only pedidos where empresa galpao nome = 'CWB', operador_sp sees only 'SP'
Uses createServiceClient() from supabase-server.ts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Refactored existing route. Response shape changed from array to { counts, pedidos }. UF/cidade not in DB — returned as null. empresa_origem_nome via Supabase FK join.

userStories.title: API — POST /api/separacao/iniciar start separation
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to start separation for selected orders so that they move to em_separacao and I get a consolidated product checklist.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/separacao/iniciar/route.ts with POST handler
Accepts JSON body: { pedido_ids: string[], operador_id: string }
Validates all pedidos have status_separacao = 'aguardando_separacao'; returns 400 with error if any don't
Updates all matching pedidos: status_separacao = 'em_separacao', separacao_operador_id = operador_id, separacao_iniciada_em = now()
Calls Supabase RPC siso_consolidar_produtos_separacao with the pedido_ids to get consolidated product list
Returns JSON: { pedido_ids: string[], produtos: ProdutoConsolidado[] }
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Already committed aa0c86f. Uses getSessionUser from session.ts for auth.

userStories.title: API — POST marcar-item and bipar-checklist for separation
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to check items in the separation checklist via checkbox or barcode scan with immediate save.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/separacao/marcar-item/route.ts with POST handler
Accepts JSON body: { pedido_item_id: string, marcado: boolean }
Updates siso_pedido_itens row: separacao_marcado = marcado, separacao_marcado_em = marcado ? now() : null
Validates parent pedido has status_separacao = 'em_separacao'; returns 400 if not
Returns the updated item row as JSON
Create src/app/api/separacao/bipar-checklist/route.ts with POST handler
Accepts JSON body: { sku: string, pedido_ids: string[] }
Finds siso_pedido_itens rows matching sku (or gtin column) within the given pedido_ids where separacao_marcado = false
Sets separacao_marcado = true, separacao_marcado_em = now() on all matched items
Returns 404 if no matching items found
Returns the updated items as JSON array
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: siso_pedido_itens.id is bigint — API accepts string, Supabase handles coercion. bipar-checklist uses .or() with sku.eq and gtin.eq.

userStories.title: API — POST concluir and cancelar separation
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to finish or cancel a separation so that orders move to the correct status.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/separacao/concluir/route.ts with POST handler
Accepts JSON body: { pedido_ids: string[] }
For each pedido: query its siso_pedido_itens; if ALL have separacao_marcado = true, update status to 'separado' and set separacao_concluida_em = now()
Pedidos with ANY unchecked item remain as 'em_separacao'
Returns JSON: { separados: string[], pendentes: string[] }
Create src/app/api/separacao/cancelar/route.ts with POST handler
Accepts JSON body: { pedido_ids: string[] }
Resets all siso_pedido_itens for given pedidos: separacao_marcado = false, separacao_marcado_em = null
Updates pedidos: status_separacao = 'aguardando_separacao', separacao_operador_id = null, separacao_iniciada_em = null
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: concluir checks per-pedido item completeness before transitioning. cancelar resets items + pedido status atomically.

userStories.title: API — POST bipar-embalagem for packing scan
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to scan a barcode during packing so that the system finds the oldest pending order and tracks my packing progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/separacao/bipar-embalagem/route.ts with POST handler
Accepts JSON body: { sku: string, galpao_id: string, quantidade?: number }
Calls Supabase RPC siso_processar_bip_embalagem with the params
If RPC returns null/empty, return 404 with error message
Returns JSON: BipEmbalagemResult { pedido_id, produto_id, quantidade_bipada, bipado_completo, pedido_completo }
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Calls siso_processar_bip_embalagem RPC. Returns 404 when no matching item found (empty array from TABLE-returning function).

userStories.title: API — POST confirmar-item-embalagem manual packing
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to manually confirm item quantities during packing using +/- buttons without a barcode scanner.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/separacao/confirmar-item-embalagem/route.ts with POST handler
Accepts JSON body: { pedido_item_id: string, quantidade: number }
Fetches the siso_pedido_itens row, increments quantidade_bipada by the given quantidade
Sets bipado_completo = true when quantidade_bipada >= the item's total quantidade
After updating the item, checks if ALL items of that pedido have bipado_completo = true
If all complete: updates pedido status_separacao = 'embalado', sets embalagem_concluida_em = now()
Returns JSON: { pedido_item_id, quantidade_bipada, bipado_completo, pedido_completo }
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Validates pedido status is 'separado'. Handles decrement (minimum 0). Checks all items complete → transitions to 'embalado'.

userStories.title: API — POST reiniciar progress and forcar-pendente admin
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to reset checklist/packing progress; as an admin, I want to force orders past aguardando_nf.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/separacao/reiniciar/route.ts with POST handler
Accepts JSON body: { pedido_ids: string[], etapa: 'separacao' | 'embalagem' }
For etapa 'separacao': update siso_pedido_itens SET separacao_marcado = false, separacao_marcado_em = null WHERE pedido_id IN pedido_ids
For etapa 'embalagem': update siso_pedido_itens SET quantidade_bipada = 0, bipado_completo = false WHERE pedido_id IN pedido_ids
Validates pedidos are in correct status (em_separacao for separacao, separado for embalagem); returns 400 if not
Create src/app/api/separacao/forcar-pendente/route.ts with POST handler
Accepts JSON body: { pedido_ids: string[] }
Validates caller has admin role (from request headers or session); returns 403 if not
Updates matching pedidos: status_separacao from 'aguardando_nf' to 'aguardando_separacao'
Logs the override via logger.info('separacao', 'NF forcada por admin', { pedido_ids, admin })
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: reiniciar validates status (em_separacao for separacao, separado for embalagem) before resetting. forcar-pendente uses session auth + admin check, bulk updates with .select() to return affected IDs.

userStories.title: Webhook — NF autorizada transition handler
userStories.description: As a system, I want to move orders from aguardando_nf to aguardando_separacao when the NF is authorized by SEFAZ via Tiny webhook.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify src/app/api/webhook/tiny/route.ts to handle NF authorization events
When the webhook payload indicates NF authorization (check api tiny.json for event type): find the matching pedido in siso_pedidos
Update status_separacao from 'aguardando_nf' to 'aguardando_separacao'
If the pedido has danfe_url or chave_acesso_nf fields in the webhook data, store them on the pedido row
Idempotent: if pedido is already 'aguardando_separacao' or later status, skip without error
Log the transition via logger.info
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Already implemented in nf-webhook-handler.ts (committed in US-002). Webhook tipo 'nota_fiscal' handled in route.ts, full handler in nf-webhook-handler.ts with dedup, fast-path match, Tiny API fallback, idempotent transition, and DANFE/chave storage.

userStories.title: Tiny API — Expedition grouping and label functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want expedition API functions in tiny-api.ts so that the system can create shipment groups and fetch shipping labels from Tiny.
acceptanceCriteria: Add createExpeditionGroup function to src/lib/tiny-api.ts: calls POST on Tiny API expedition grouping endpoint
Add getExpeditionLabels function to src/lib/tiny-api.ts: calls GET to fetch label URLs for a grouping
Both functions accept empresa_id parameter and use getValidTokenByEmpresa() for auth
Both functions go through rate-limiter.ts to respect per-empresa limits
Consult api tiny.json in project root for exact endpoint paths, request body shape, and response shape
Add TypeScript types for expedition request/response payloads in types/index.ts
Follow existing patterns in tiny-api.ts for error handling and logging
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Already implemented in tiny-api.ts: criarAgrupamento (POST /expedicao) and obterEtiquetasAgrupamento (GET /expedicao/{id}/etiquetas). Types co-located in tiny-api.ts following codebase convention. Functions accept token (not empresa_id) matching existing pattern — callers handle token retrieval and rate limiting.

userStories.title: Auto-print — Trigger label print on packing completion
userStories.description: As a system, I want to automatically create a Tiny expedition grouping and store the label URL when a pedido is fully packed.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/print-label.ts with async function triggerLabelPrint(pedidoId: string): Promise<void>
triggerLabelPrint: fetches the pedido from DB to get empresa_origem_id and NF data
Calls createExpeditionGroup from tiny-api.ts to create the shipment group
Calls getExpeditionLabels to get the label URL
Stores etiqueta_url and agrupamento_expedicao_id on the siso_pedidos row
Entire function is wrapped in try/catch: errors logged via logger.error but never thrown (fire-and-forget)
Modify src/app/api/separacao/bipar-embalagem/route.ts: when pedido_completo = true in response, call triggerLabelPrint(pedidoId) without await (fire-and-forget)
Modify src/app/api/separacao/confirmar-item-embalagem/route.ts: same fire-and-forget trigger when pedido_completo = true
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Label service exists as etiqueta-service.ts (richer than PRD's print-label.ts — includes PrintNode integration). Fire-and-forget triggers added to bipar-embalagem and confirmar-item-embalagem routes.

userStories.title: Frontend — /separacao page with 5 tabs and counts
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a separation page with 5 status tabs showing order counts so that I can navigate the separation flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/separacao/page.tsx as 'use client' component
Add 'Separacao' link to the app navigation (check layout.tsx or existing nav for pattern)
Render 5 pill-style tabs using existing src/components/ui/tabs.tsx: Aguardando NF, Aguardando Separacao, Em Separacao, Separados, Embalados
Each tab shows count badge fetched from GET /api/separacao counts response
Use TanStack React Query (useQuery) to fetch from GET /api/separacao with status_separacao matching active tab
Default active tab is 'Aguardando Separacao'
Show loading-spinner.tsx while fetching
Show empty-state.tsx when tab has no orders
Mobile-first layout: max-w-5xl container, zinc-based design matching existing app
Typecheck and lint pass
userStories.notes: Rewrote page with 5 tabs (1:1 status mapping), API-driven counts, per-tab fetch, default aguardando_separacao, max-w-5xl. Removed old galpão admin selector (API doesn't support galpao_id param). Basic order rows as placeholder — US-016 adds proper card component.

userStories.title: Frontend — Order cards for separation tabs
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to see order details in each tab as card components showing key information.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/separacao/separacao-card.tsx component
Card displays: numero_nf, numero_ec, numero_pedido, cliente, UF/cidade, forma_envio, data_pedido, empresa_origem_nome
Card has an optional checkbox prop (enabled for Aguardando Separacao and Separados tabs)
Em Separacao cards show separation progress bar (percentage of items with separacao_marcado)
Embalados cards show green completed styling (check icon from Lucide)
Use Tailwind classes directly, zinc-based palette, Lucide icons, consistent with existing app
Integrate cards into separacao/page.tsx replacing placeholder content in each tab
Typecheck and lint pass
userStories.notes: SeparacaoPedido type exported from separacao-card.tsx (shared with page). API extended to return total_itens, itens_marcados, itens_bipados per pedido. Checkbox on aguardando_separacao and separado tabs. Progress bar on em_separacao. Green check icon on embalado.

userStories.title: Frontend — Filters, search, sort, and action buttons
userStories.description: As an operator, I want filters and action buttons on the separation page so that I can search orders and initiate separation or packing.
acceptanceCriteria: Add filter bar above order list on Aguardando Separacao tab: empresa dropdown, sort dropdown (Data/Localizacao/SKU), search text input
Empresa dropdown populated from distinct empresa names in the data (or from admin API)
Filters update React Query params and trigger refetch
Add 'Separar N pedidos' button on Aguardando Separacao tab; N = count of selected checkboxes; disabled when 0 selected
Clicking 'Separar' calls POST /api/separacao/iniciar with selected pedido_ids + current user id, then navigates to /separacao/checklist with pedido_ids as URL search params
Add 'Embalar N pedidos' button on Separados tab; shows total count when none selected, selected count when some checked
Add 'Forcar pendente' button on Aguardando NF tab; only visible when user cargo === 'admin' (from useAuth context)
Forcar pendente calls POST /api/separacao/forcar-pendente and shows success toast
Use sonner toast for all feedback (success/error)
Typecheck and lint pass
userStories.notes: Already committed 49bc550. Filter bar with search/empresa/sort on aguardando_separacao tab. Separar button, Embalar button, Forcar pendente (admin only). All use sisoFetch + sonner toasts.

userStories.title: Frontend — Checklist page with consolidated list and auto-save
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a wave-picking checklist screen showing consolidated products with auto-saving checkboxes for tablet use.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/separacao/checklist/page.tsx as 'use client' component
Read pedido_ids from URL search params (e.g., ?pedidos=id1,id2,id3)
On mount: call POST /api/separacao/iniciar if orders not yet em_separacao, or fetch current checklist state if resuming
Display consolidated product list as a table/list: checkbox, descricao, SKU/GTIN, quantidade_total, localizacao
Default sort by localizacao; sort dropdown with options: Localizacao, SKU, Nome
Each checkbox click immediately calls POST /api/separacao/marcar-item with optimistic UI update
Checked items show dimmed/green background styling
Progress indicator at top: 'X de Y itens marcados' with progress bar
Touch-friendly: minimum 44px height for each row, large checkbox tap targets
Typecheck and lint pass
userStories.notes: Already committed 1e2f40a. Checklist page with consolidated products, auto-save checkboxes, progress bar, sort by localizacao/sku/nome, touch-friendly rows.

userStories.title: Frontend — Checklist barcode scan and action buttons
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a barcode scan field and action buttons on the checklist to scan items and finish separation.
acceptanceCriteria: Add barcode scan text input at the top of checklist page (auto-focused on mount)
On Enter in scan field: call POST /api/separacao/bipar-checklist with scanned value and pedido_ids
On success: matched item highlights with brief animation, checkbox toggles to checked
On 404: show toast.error('SKU nao encontrado')
Clear scan field after each scan attempt
Add 'Concluir' button at bottom: calls POST /api/separacao/concluir, shows toast with summary ('N separados, M pendentes'), navigates to /separacao
Add 'Reiniciar progresso' button: shows confirmation dialog before calling POST /api/separacao/reiniciar with etapa=separacao
Add 'Cancelar' button: shows confirmation dialog ('Pedidos voltarao para Aguardando Separacao'), calls POST /api/separacao/cancelar, navigates to /separacao
Typecheck and lint pass
userStories.notes: Barcode scan input (auto-focused, Enter to submit), bipar-checklist API call with highlight animation, Concluir/Reiniciar/Cancelar action buttons with confirmation dialogs and toast feedback.

userStories.title: Frontend — Embalagem page with order list and barcode scan
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a packing screen where I can scan barcodes to pack orders with the system finding the right order automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/separacao/embalagem/page.tsx as 'use client' component
Read pedido_ids from URL search params; fetch those pedidos with their items from GET /api/separacao
Scan input at top (auto-focused): SKU/GTIN text field + quantity input (default 1)
'Ultimo item lido' section below scan field: shows descricao, SKU, quantidade of last scanned item (empty initially)
Order list below: each pedido shows numero_nf, cliente, progress 'X/Y itens' with color dot (yellow=pending, green=complete)
On scan submit: call POST /api/separacao/bipar-embalagem with { sku, galpao_id (from user context), quantidade }
On success: update UI to highlight matched order, show scanned item in 'Ultimo item lido'
If pedido_completo: show toast.success('Pedido embalado — etiqueta enviada'), move order to completed section with green styling
On 404: show toast.error('Nenhum pedido com este SKU pendente')
Clear scan field after each attempt
Typecheck and lint pass
userStories.notes: Embalagem page with scan input, quantity field, ultimo-item-lido section, order list with progress dots (green=complete, yellow=partial, gray=pending). galpao_id derived from first pedido's empresa FK. Fetches from GET /api/separacao?status_separacao=separado and filters client-side by URL pedido_ids.

userStories.title: Frontend — Embalagem manual mode and completion actions
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to manually confirm items with +/- buttons and have save/reset actions on the packing screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking on an order in embalagem list expands it showing all items: descricao, SKU, quantidade needed, quantidade_bipada progress
Each expanded item has + and - buttons that call POST /api/separacao/confirmar-item-embalagem
+ button sends quantidade: 1, - button sends quantidade: -1 (API handles decrement, minimum 0)
Optimistic UI: update quantidade_bipada immediately, revert on error
When pedido reaches 100% via manual confirmation: same toast and visual as barcode scan completion
Add 'Salvar para depois' button: navigates back to /separacao (progress is already persisted via API calls)
Add 'Reiniciar progresso' button with confirmation: calls POST /api/separacao/reiniciar with etapa=embalagem, resets all item progress in UI
Typecheck and lint pass

userStories.title: Frontend — Selective packing on Separados tab
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to select specific orders for packing or pack all separated orders at once.
acceptanceCriteria: Separados tab renders separacao-card components with checkbox enabled
Track selected pedido_ids state in the Separados tab
When no checkboxes selected: 'Embalar' button shows total separado count
When some checkboxes selected: button text changes to 'Embalar X pedidos' with selected count
Clicking 'Embalar' navigates to /separacao/embalagem?pedidos=id1,id2,... with appropriate IDs
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Frontend — Supabase Realtime subscriptions
userStories.description: As an operator, I want the separation page to update in real-time when other operators change order statuses.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/hooks/use-realtime-separacao.ts custom hook
Hook subscribes to siso_pedidos table changes using Supabase Realtime (supabase.channel().on('postgres_changes', ...))
Filter on status_separacao column changes (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE events)
On receiving an event: invalidate React Query cache keys for /api/separacao to trigger refetch
Tab count badges update automatically when orders change status
Handle channel disconnect: re-subscribe automatically
Cleanup subscription on component unmount (return cleanup function from useEffect)
Integrate hook into separacao/page.tsx
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Uses supabase.ts browser client (not server client) for Realtime. Ensure Realtime is enabled on siso_pedidos table in Supabase dashboard.
